escalations.subject: Push main to origin: configure git credentials for loom0btc
escalations.reason: SSH key generated and remote switched to SSH, but the public key must be added to loom0btc GitHub account manually (no existing GitHub auth to do it programmatically). Public key: ssh-ed25519 AAAAC3NzaC1lZDI1NTE5AAAAIMXJNzgEpJpJBALWTaITwB6gShchsKt4LOEFbic+MC3Q

escalations.subject: Publish arc-starter: merge v2 into main (5 commits ahead)
escalations.reason: Branch divergence detected: v2 and main share ancestor 7ed1a5f but have 12 divergent commits. Manual resolution required before fast-forward merge is possible.

escalations.subject: Configure Iris on-chain identity: Bitcoin, Stacks, BNS accounts
escalations.reason: Blocked: requires whoabuddy to 1) decide if Iris gets own keypair or shares fleet wallet, 2) generate/assign Bitcoin+Stacks keys, 3) register BNS name (iris0.btc), 4) fund with STX. Existing wallet at ~/.aibtc/wallets/ may be Arc's inherited from VM clone — needs clarification before use.

escalations.subject: Set up X API credentials to enable social-x-ecosystem sensor
escalations.reason: Waiting on whoabuddy for X API OAuth 1.0a credentials (consumer key/secret + access token/secret). No credentials in store. Follow-up task #70 already exists for this request.
